description: Generated from Monitoring/mongodb_exporter_result.txt. Uses metric types from mongodb_exporter_result.txt, row-based layout, single-instance selection, and per-panel descriptions.

panels.description: Shows whether the selected MongoDB exporter target is reachable and returning metrics. Green means the scrape target is up.

panels.description: Server uptime in seconds for the selected MongoDB instance.

panels.description: Current number of active client connections reported by serverStatus.connections.current.

panels.description: Resident memory currently used by the mongod process. The exporter exposes this in MiB, so the query converts it to bytes.

panels.description: Percent of the WiredTiger cache currently in use. Warning at 80% and critical at 95%.

panels.description: Maximum collector scrape duration in milliseconds across exporter collectors for the selected instance.
